title: Play puzzle games in a feed like TikTok
abstract:
Hi everyone. I spent the last year making Puzzle Express.

Play and discover puzzles as if you were scrolling reels: play if you want or swipe up to skip.

Made this as a healthier alternative to doomscrolling and a great, new way to discover puzzles you might love.

If you don't fancy endle
abstract_zh: 嘿大家好！我花了一年时间开发了“Puzzle Express”，就像刷 TikTok 一样解锁益智游戏大餐：想玩就停，不想玩就快进，再也不用担心沉迷滑屏啦！快来试试这个新鲜有趣的解压神器吧～
